full_text:
Fan Ji 范姬
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Ji (范姬)was born in Guangling commandery. Mutilated her face to avoid remarrying after her husband died. Fan Ji was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Fan Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
